mapper.select: SELECT id, category, bug_code, title, occurrence_condition, error_message, wrong_code, cause_analysis, correct_code, correct_comment, prevention, sort_order FROM bug ORDER BY category, sort_order, id

SELECT id, category, bug_code, title, occurrence_condition, error_message, wrong_code, cause_analysis, correct_code, correct_comment, prevention, sort_order FROM bug WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, category, bug_code, title, occurrence_condition, error_message, wrong_code, cause_analysis, correct_code, correct_comment, prevention, sort_order FROM bug WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM bug ORDER BY category
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bug (category, bug_code, title, occurrence_condition, error_message, wrong_code, cause_analysis, correct_code, correct_comment, prevention, sort_order) VALUES (#{category}, #{bugCode}, #{title}, #{occurrenceCondition}, #{errorMessage}, #{wrongCode}, #{causeAnalysis}, #{correctCode}, #{correctComment}, #{prevention}, #{sortOrder})
